notes:
## Change summary

Single-file edit: src/renderer/game/systems/runtimeAudit.js only.
LOC delta: +18 lines (comment block + const declaration + one `continue` guard).

## Diff (logical)

Before auditRegionBiomes() a module-scope constant was added:

  const ACKNOWLEDGED_UNKNOWN_BIOMES = ['chinese', 'malay'];

with a 14-line comment block citing both regions.js line ranges and the
R1-deferred / R2-chosen decision rationale.

Inside auditRegionBiomes(), the UNKNOWN-biome warn block was updated:

  BEFORE:
    if (!biome || biome === BIOME.UNKNOWN) {
      warnings.push(makeWarning(...));
    }

  AFTER:
    if (!biome || biome === BIOME.UNKNOWN) {
      if (ACKNOWLEDGED_UNKNOWN_BIOMES.includes(region.id)) continue;
      warnings.push(makeWarning(...));
    }

## Inline doc quotes consulted (amended-.md hard rule honored for BOTH regions)

regions.js:479-481 (chinese):
  // Existing data tagged "varied" (China spans many biomes); enum has no
  // multi-biome value, so UNKNOWN — terrain renderer can pick a default.
  biome: BIOME.UNKNOWN,

regions.js:647-650 (malay):
  // Malay Archipelago — tropical rainforest islands. Enum has no
  // jungle/forest value; archipelago could read as WATER but tin/bauxite/
  // rubber are land resources, so UNKNOWN until the enum grows.
  biome: BIOME.UNKNOWN,

Both confirm the UNKNOWN assignment is intentional — an enum gap, not a data error.

## Allowlist confirmation

ALLOWLIST IS CLOSED: exactly ['chinese', 'malay'], no wildcards.
Comment explicitly states: "Allowlist is CLOSED: any other region that drifts
to UNKNOWN biome should still warn so the mistake is caught."
Removal instructions tied to R1 landing (widen BIOME enum + update regions.js).

## Prior commit context (c72e840)

This task was dispatched under the AMENDED definition established in commit
c72e840, which added the Hard rule: consult inline data-file documentation
before validating. Both regions were audited per that rule before the
allowlist was written. The comment block in the code cites both line ranges
so future readers can verify the same documentation.

## Verdict

status: complete
verdict_tag: static-only-fix

Runtime validation (boot game, confirm 0 UNKNOWN-biome WARNs for chinese/malay)
is the user's responsibility — this fix is static-only.
